records.title: Read Dutch parking signs and blue-zone rules
records.description: Parking legality depends on national traffic signs, road markings and local restrictions, including permit zones, disabled spaces and blue-line areas where a parking disc may be required.

official_source.title: Road Traffic Signs and Regulations in the Netherlands

records.ai_summary: Read every sign at the exact space and check arrows, time panels, permit codes and road markings. In a blue zone set an approved disc to the arrival time and respect the displayed maximum stay.

records.title: Check local paid-parking hours and tariffs
records.description: Municipalities set street-parking zones, chargeable hours and tariffs, which can vary by street and change over time even within the same city.
records.ai_summary: Use the municipality's current map or meter for the exact zone, register the correct number plate and confirm the paid end time. Do not rely on an old app tariff or a nearby street's rules.

records.title: Use P+R with onward public transport
records.description: NS Park and Ride locations let drivers transfer to rail, with free and paid sites and possible traveller discounts that depend on the same-day train journey and payment method.
records.ai_summary: Check availability, maximum discounted duration and the accepted proof of train travel before entering. At departure, validate the eligible travel card or ticket before paying the parking charge.

records.title: Apply for a municipal resident parking permit
records.description: Residents of paid-parking areas may qualify for a digital permit subject to address, vehicle, private-space and local waiting-list rules set by the municipality.
records.ai_summary: Check eligibility before buying or leasing a vehicle, especially private-space and waiting-list conditions. Keep the registered number plate current and monitor municipal messages about approval or renewal.

records.title: Register visitor parking or a local discount
records.description: Some municipalities offer resident-managed visitor parking sessions or discount codes, with the applicable zone, time, number plate and payment registered digitally.
records.ai_summary: Register the visitor's correct number plate, start and end time, and eligible area before leaving the vehicle. Confirm who pays and whether a prepaid session can be changed or ended early.

records.title: Combine a disability card with local parking rules
records.description: A European disability parking card does not automatically create identical payment rights in every municipality, and some cities require an additional digital permit linked to a number plate.
records.ai_summary: Check the destination municipality before travel and distinguish use of the physical disability card from any local digital permit. Display or register the required proof and obey time limits and reserved-space signs.

records.title: Check and challenge a municipal parking charge correctly
records.description: A parking tax assessment or enforcement notice should be checked against the number plate, zone, payment record and stated objection route before the deadline expires.
records.ai_summary: Keep the parking receipt, app confirmation, photographs of signs and location, and the notice itself. Follow the issuer's objection procedure rather than assuming every parking charge is a traffic fine.

records.title: Verify parking rules with the responsible municipality
records.description: Local parking policy can control permits, paid zones, garages, loading areas, environmental access and vehicle-specific restrictions beyond the national traffic-sign framework.
records.ai_summary: Identify the responsible municipality and check its official map and current rules for the exact address. Recheck when moving house, changing vehicle or entering a newly regulated area.

records.title: Choose official short- or long-stay airport parking
records.description: Schiphol publishes official short-stay, long-stay and valet options with distinct locations, transfer times, reservation conditions and vehicle-access instructions.
records.ai_summary: Match the parking product to trip length, terminal access and vehicle size, then save the reservation and entry method. Verify the official location and change rules before driving to the airport.

records.title: Use station parking with an NS Business Card
records.description: Eligible NS Business Card users can activate P+R door-to-door parking, enter supported sites and receive costs through the business invoice, with traveller discounts subject to conditions.

official_source.title: Parking at P+R with the NS-Business Card

records.ai_summary: Confirm that the employer enabled the P+R service and check the site's availability and rate. Follow the correct validation sequence at payment so an eligible same-day train discount is applied.
